description: Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: White dial with white hands Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Branding on 12 hour mark and date aperture on the three 3 mark on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 metres, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: One year international warranty
